strategies.name: Direct One
strategies.hypothesis: A single independent answer is the minimum-cost baseline.

strategies.name: Five-Vote Plurality
strategies.hypothesis: A small independent plurality is a stable low-cost baseline.

strategies.name: Nine-Vote Plurality
strategies.hypothesis: A larger judge-free pool can average away plausible mistakes.

strategies.name: Fifteen-Vote Plurality
strategies.hypothesis: A broad judge-free pool may outperform fragile evaluation layers.

strategies.name: Five Solvers plus Three Verifiers
strategies.hypothesis: Independent re-derivation can select a correct minority answer when five solvers disagree.

strategies.name: Five Solvers plus Three Repairers
strategies.hypothesis: Independent repairers can escape a candidate set whose correct answer is absent or underrepresented.
